questions.prompt:
An algorithm is required to output a countdown from a starting number down to 0.

Write a Python program to:
  • prompt the user to enter a starting integer
  • repeatedly output the current value and decrease it by 1
  • continue this process until the value reaches 0
  • output an appropriate final message
questions.explanation:
Format:
num = int(input('Enter starting number: '))
while num > 0:
    print(num)
    num -= 1
print('Blast off!')
